name: RedSocks Backdoor Connection
description: RedSocks Backdoor connection to a C2 server is detected. The alert uses the `RedSocks Backdoor` list to check against the source IP in the logs. This indicates an ongoing C2 communication.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the network connection from host `{hostname}` to the malicious C2 server `{c2_server}` at `{timestamp}`. The connection was initiated by a process with PID `{process_id}`. Analyze the user (`{user_name}`) associated with the process and any other network traffic to or from this host. Determine if the host is infected and if the backdoor is actively communicating. Provide a summary of your findings and recommend an incident response plan.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname of the affected host.

parameters.name: c2_server
parameters.description: The malicious C2 server to which the host connected.

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: The Process ID of the process that initiated the connection.

parameters.name: user_name
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.
